description.value:
Type: Hachimon Tonkou

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 3

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: C, P, Mas

As Kai-mon Kai, except as above, and you open the Life Gate, improving the bonuses to +4 Strength and Dexterity, and +15 ft land speed. Your Chakra Signa-ture increases by one step, and you gain 8 temporary Chakra. Each use halves the Chakra gained from opening any further Gates within the next 24 hours. The damage you take increases to 4 damage per round, and the fatigue lasts for 5 minutes after the encounter ends, with the save DC to negate it increasing to 20.

Mastery: The second step allows you to activate this technique as part of opening a greater Gate. Doing so will not grant you its benefits, nor will it have you suffer from any of its penalties.

The fifth step reduces damage taken to 3 per round.
